description: Prepare a Business Continuity Plan for internal review by updating the document governance for '/home/ga/Documents/bcp_plan.docx'. Set the document properties with Title: 'Continuity of Operations Plan – Meridian Financial Group', Subject: 'Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery', Author: 'Diana Kowalski', and Keywords: 'BCP, COOP, disaster recovery, FEMA'. Insert a 'DRAFT' watermark and add a footer to all pages with the text: 'CONFIDENTIAL – FOR INTERNAL REVIEW ONLY – Meridian Financial Group'. Save the final document to '/home/ga/Documents/bcp_plan_draft.docx' without overwriting the original.
